# Chapter 12: Forensic engineering and accident investigation  (~110 pp)
- 12.1 The role of the forensic engineer (12) · 12.2 Evidence preservation (12) · 12.3 Reconstruction methods (15) · 12.4 Metallurgical, electrical, structural forensics (18) · 12.5 Software forensics (15) · 12.6 Reporting standards: NTSB, AAIB, BEA (15) · 12.7 Legal and ethical pressures on forensic engineers (15) · 12.8 Failure section: when forensic engineering reached the wrong conclusion (8)

**Archetype**: ethics, failure. **Project**: investigate one small failure (broken household object, software crash) using forensic discipline; produce a 5-page report. **Exercises**: 20.
